In LXXXV we find principles of public health and sanitation
highlighted following Ayurvedic injunctions.

Brhat Samhita
Chapters LXXXVI to XGVI form one vast section dealing
with omens and auguries. The author mentions several authorities
for this subject. A king of Avanli named Sridravyavardhana is also said
to have written on this subject. Unlike portents which always bode
ill these auguries presage both prosperity and adversity for those
